step_1.title: Cleanse
step_1.product: Tatcha The Deep Cleanse
step_1.description:
No reason to wash your face in the morning even if you use a retinol at night, UNLESS you get super greasy overnight or work out in the am. But if you want to start clean, any gentle non-stripping cleanser works.

If you wear make up, sometimes a gentle exfoliant is good in the am to smooth your palette. I love this chemical exfoliant by Tatcha since it has a small amount of grit to make you feel clean.

Fun fact: Many people use cleansers with chemical exfoliants wrong, work it in on a damp face and let it sit for a minute or two. Then gently start to massage in while rinsing. I used to think expensive cleansers were a scam until I realized this.

step_2.title: Tone
step_2.description: Swipe your face with a cotton pad and toner if you wash your face in the am. I like micellar water or Thayers non-alcoholic toner. No need to if you did not cleanse, skip to step 3.

step_3.title: Mist
step_3.description: Products penetrate better on moist skin plus, it feels so luxurious. Obviously optional but there are a lot of benefits of rose water.

step_4.title: Serum
step_4.product: The Ordinary Multi-Peptide + Copper Peptides 1% Serum
step_4.description:
The copper peptide serum is great to use with the NuFace, but you can use any water-based serum. The NuFace will help anything you put on at this step penetrate deeper, do not use any AHAs or oil-based serums as it will block the microcurrent.

This product was previously sold as The Ordinary Buffet + Copper Peptides 1% and is now sold under the Multi-Peptide + Copper Peptides 1% Serum name.

If you won't be using the NuFace, this is a good time to use a vitamin C serum. Then skip to Step 7.

step_5.title: NuFace Gel
step_5.product: NuFACE Hydrating Aqua Gel Activator
step_5.description:
Nuface reformulated this gel with their new line of devices. The old gel burned my skin and was overpriced, but this new gel makes my skin feel so plump and basically doubles as a hyaluronic acid serum that doesn't need to be rinsed off and saves me a step.

If this is out of your price range I used to use a collodial silver gel which has a lot of it's own skin benefits. Another budget option that is also easier to get anywhere is aloe vera gel.

step_6.title: NuFace
step_6.description:
If you have the ability to commit to this DAILY, this is my holy grail, the one thing I would take with me to a deserted island. I use the mini, videos on how to use are online.

It works by sending painless microcurrent into your muscles to stimulate collagen production. It does everything it promises, irons out wrinkles, lifts and tones your face, a miracle.

If you feel you don't have time to do this in the am, pm is fine, BUT it does have an instant lifting effect which would be a waste on your pillow.

step_7.title: SPF Eye Cream
step_7.description: Many neglect to put SPF on/around their eyes (slash, it burns). So I found a great eye cream with SPF and brightening properties by Supergoop.

step_8.title: SPF
step_8.description:
I love the Josie Maran SPF, it is argan oil based though so if your face does not tolerate oil, then find any other SPF that is 30+ to use on a daily basis.

It doesn't matter if it's winter and you don't leave the house, you are being exposed to UV (unless you are also in a windowless room).

I'm also partial to mineral sunscreens because, less chemicals. Another reason I love the Josie Maran one because it doesn't leave that white cast like other mineral sunscreens.

step_9.title: Face Oil
step_9.description: I have a favorite oil, but it's currently not on sale, so I have been using a basic rose-hip oil. Again if your skin does not like oil, you can skip, but depending on why your skin doesn't tolerate oils, there may be an oil for your skin type (for ex: acne prone skin can use jojoba oil). Oil acts as a sealant to work allllll those previous steps in and provide moisture to prevent wrinkles.

step_10.title: Gua Sha
step_10.description: A gua sha stone is a flat piece of jade used for a lymphatic drainage face massage. Jade rollers kind of push things around your face, but the gua sha is to be used in gentle upward and out strokes to your neck/hairline to get fluids and toxins to flush out of your system (great for those who wake up puffy!). You will need some sort of oil to create slip. There are a lot of tutorials online for different skin concerns.

step_1.title: Cleanse
step_1.product: La Roche-Posay Toleriane Purifying Foaming Facial Cleanser
step_1.description: Any gentle non-stripping cleanser is good to wash off the day. If you wear make up, make sure to double wash with an oil-based cleanser first then a gentle one. If you feel like you need an exfoliant, find a good gentle one like Tatcha the Deep Cleanse.

step_2.title: Tone
step_2.description: Swipe your face with a cotton pad and toner if you wash your face in the am. I like micellar water or Thayers non-alcoholic toner. No need to if you did not cleanse, skip to step 3.

step_3.title: Mist
step_3.description: Products penetrate better on moist skin plus, it feels so luxurious. Obviously optional but there are a lot of benefits of rose water.

step_4.title: Hyaluronic Acid
step_4.product: Ordinary Hyaluronic Acid
step_4.description: HA is a tiny molecule that really penetrates to moisturize your skin, not just sit on top like most moisturizers. It will not feel hydrating, but it is and moisture is the key to preventing wrinkles! I can skip this step in the am thanks to the NuFace Gel.

step_5.title: Actives
step_5.product: Topicals Faded Serum for Dark Spots & Discoloration
step_5.description:
I have been using this serum in the evening for dark spots, though the active ingredients in it are also good for anti-aging. I did have to work my way up to a nightly use just like with most actives.

If you have never used an active like retinol or had bad experiences before, get the smallest concentration and use nightly. If you have any redness/peeling/flaking, go every other night until your skin gets accustomed to it. Then work your way up to stronger concentrations.

Retinol encourages cell turnover so it helps with wrinkles and acne. I use a retinol cream from a derm, if you have a derm I recommend getting retinol Rx because it is cheaper and you know the dosage. If not, The Ordinary has a great variety of retinols to help you ease into it.

step_6.title: Eye Cream
step_6.product: Glow Recipe Avocado Melt Retinol Eye Cream
step_6.description:
Use any moisturizing eye cream of your choice. If wrinkles/crows feet around the eyes are a concern for you, use a retinol eye cream. I love the retinol eye mask by Glow Recipe.

The older product name in this routine was Glow Recipe Avocado Melt Retinol Eye Sleeping Mask; current references list the similar/renamed product as Glow Recipe Avocado Melt Retinol Eye Cream.

step_7.title: Moisturizer
step_7.product: The Ordinary Natural Moisturizing Factors + HA Surface Hydration
step_7.description: I'm not too picky with evening moisturizers, as long as it isn't too fragranced and does the job I'm a fan. I tend to switch it up in different seasons and choose something more lightweight in the summer like the Glow Recipe Watermelon Glow Pink Juice Face Moisturizer

step_8.title: Face Oil
step_8.description: I have a favorite oil, but it's currently not on sale, so I have been using a basic rose-hip oil. Again if your skin does not like oil, you can skip, but depending on why your skin doesn't tolerate oils, there may be an oil for your skin type (for ex: acne prone skin can use jojoba oil). Oil acts as a sealant to work allllll those previous steps in and provide moisture to prevent wrinkles.

step_9.title: Gua Sha
step_9.description: A gua sha stone is a flat piece of jade used for a lymphatic drainage face massage. Jade rollers kind of push things around your face, but the gua sha is to be used in gentle upward and out strokes to your neck/hairline to get fluids and toxins to flush out of your system (great for those who wake up puffy!). You will need some sort of oil to create slip. There are a lot of tutorials online for different skin concerns.

step_10.title: Sleeping Mask
step_10.description:
Some call this "slugging" which you can do with regular vaseline, but I try to stay away from products with petrolatum. Slugging is when you put a thick mask on your face to help seal in products overnight.

I love Egyptian Magic and recently, Pomada De La Campana (yes it has petrolatum) which has brightening qualities in the zinc.

step_11.title: Lip Mask
step_11.description: Lips get dry from all that mouth breathing overnight, the Laneige lip mask is still moist when I wake up.

name: Hailey Bieber's Routine
point_description: A hydration-heavy glazed-skin routine focused on gentle cleansing, barrier support, and SPF.

sources.label: Vogue 2025
sources.headline: Hailey Bieber's Streamlined Beauty Routine Is Only 8 Steps
sources.summary: Her newer routine focuses on a water rinse, Rhode Glazing Mist, Glazing Milk, milky SPF, and a simpler mom-friendly approach.

sources.label: Vogue 2022
sources.headline: Hailey Bieber on Dewy Skin Care, Date-Night Makeup, and the Launch of Her Beauty Brand
sources.summary: This Rhode launch-era routine highlights her dry, sensitive skin, peptide-focused products, and lip treatment.

sources.label: Allure 2021
sources.headline: Hailey Bieber Revealed Her Full Nightly Skin-Care Routine
sources.summary: A 2021 nighttime recap covering her cleansers, peptide serum, barrier cream, oils, eye cream, and Aquaphor lip step.

step_1.title: Rinse
step_1.product: Water
step_1.description: In her streamlined morning routine, Hailey starts with the basics: a splash of water to rinse away the remnants of her nighttime skin care. This keeps the morning cleanse gentle, which makes sense for the dry, sensitive skin she has described.

step_2.title: Mist
step_2.description:
Use this as the first hydrating step after rinsing. Hailey said that when she is really busy in the morning, she can literally spray her face with this and walk out the door.

Rhode describes it as a hydrating face spray that can be used after cleansing, after moisturizer, or whenever skin needs a refresh.

step_3.title: Essence
step_3.description:
Press a generous amount onto the face, neck, and decollete. Hailey calls Glazing Milk one of her staple products and says she uses it in the morning, at night, and as skin prep.

Rhode recommends applying it after morning or evening cleansing, before Peptide Glazing Fluid and moisturizer.

step_4.title: Peptide Serum
step_4.product: Rhode Peptide Glazing Fluid
step_4.description:
Apply 2-3 pumps to the face, neck, and decollete. Hailey's 2022 Vogue routine centered on hydration because she has dry, sensitive skin, and this peptide serum was part of that routine.

Rhode recommends following this step with Barrier Restore Cream or Barrier Butter for best results.

step_5.title: Moisturizer
step_5.product: Rhode Barrier Restore Cream
step_5.description:
Apply as the barrier-supporting moisturizer step. Rhode recommends using about a half finger-length amount on the face, neck, and decollete.

This fits the Hailey routine logic: keep skin hydrated, comfortable, and supported before SPF.

step_6.title: SPF
step_6.description: Use generously as the final morning skin-care step. Hailey says sunscreen is non-negotiable, and Vogue noted that she likes milky SPF formulas and fell in love with ISDIN Fusion Water Magic SPF on a trip to Paris.

step_7.title: Lip Treatment
step_7.description: Glaze lips during the day and reapply whenever they need hydration. In her Vogue routine, Hailey said she does not leave the house without a lip product, morning or night.

step_1.title: Oil Cleanse
step_1.product: MARA Chia + Moringa Algae Enzyme Cleansing Oil
step_1.description: Massage onto dry skin to break down SPF and makeup, then rinse. In her nighttime routine, Hailey said oil cleansing was a newer addition that made a big difference, and she prefers it over makeup wipes.

step_2.title: Hydrating Cleanse
step_2.product: HoliFrog Tashmoo Water Lily Milky Wash
step_2.description: Follow the oil cleanse with a gentle, hydrating cleanser. Hailey said she does not love a super-foaming cleanser and prefers a richer option that does not leave dry, sensitive skin feeling stripped.

step_3.title: Essence
step_3.description: Press into clean skin before serum. Hailey says she uses Glazing Milk at night too, and Vogue noted that she likes it even when using stronger nighttime products because it helps buffer irritation and support hydration.

step_4.title: Peptide Serum
step_4.product: Rhode Peptide Glazing Fluid
step_4.description:
Apply 2-3 pumps and press it in gently. Hailey's newer Rhode-era routines center this peptide serum as a hydrating, barrier-supporting step.

In her earlier 2021 nighttime routine, she also mentioned using Biba Los Angeles Plant Stem Cell Peptide Serum and emphasized that she is a big fan of peptides.

step_5.title: Rich Moisturizer
step_5.product: Rhode Barrier Restore Cream
step_5.description:
Use a richer moisturizer layer at night. Hailey's famous rule is that if she is not getting into bed looking like a glazed donut, then she is not doing the right thing.

In her earlier 2021 nighttime routine, she also mentioned using Biba Los Angeles Cream Barrier.

step_6.title: Face Oil
step_6.product: Furtuna Skin Due Alberi Biphase Moisturizing Oil
step_6.description: Use only if skin is very dry. Hailey layered a thin amount of face oil for extra glow and hydration, but she also noted that she avoids heavier oils when she is actively breaking out.

step_7.title: Pimple Patches
step_7.description: Use on active pimples only. Hailey said she likes sleeping in these when she is breaking out because they help a pimple heal faster, and she also likes that they look cute.

step_8.title: Eye Cream
step_8.product: Ilia Bright Start Activated Eye Cream
step_8.description:
Tap gently around the eye area as one of the last skin-care steps. Hailey included eye cream in her nighttime routine after treating and moisturizing her face.

Her original routine used BareMinerals Ageless Phyto-Retinol Eye Cream, but that exact eye cream is no longer available. Ilia Bright Start Activated Eye Cream is a similar available retinol-alternative eye cream.

step_9.title: Lip Occlusive
step_9.description:
Finish with Aquaphor on the lips. Hailey said she legitimately cannot go to bed without lip balm because she hates chapped, dry lips, and Aquaphor is her go-to.

She also uses a little extra Aquaphor on flaky dry patches when needed.

name: Dua Lipa's Routine
point_description: A performance-proof routine built around cleansing, lightweight repair, glow, barrier support, and daily SPF.

sources.label: Harper's Bazaar 2025
sources.headline: Dua Lipa Just Reinvented the Celebrity Beauty Brand
sources.summary: Dua talks about her three-piece DUA by Augustinus Bader line, cleansing before bed, restoring skin while traveling, and her favorite Supercharged Glow Complex.

sources.label: Vogue 2025
sources.headline: The Beauty Secrets Dua Lipa Learned Working at a Club
sources.summary: Dua shares her current Beauty Secrets routine, including Bioderma, DUA by Augustinus Bader, iS Clinical, and her tour-tested glow step.

sources.label: Vogue 2025
sources.headline: The Exact Beauty Products Dua Lipa Uses to Get Her Glow
sources.summary: A Vogue product roundup naming earlier favorites like EltaMD SPF, Pai cleansing oil, Caudalie mist, Augustinus Bader creams, Medik8, Sarah Chapman, Tatcha, and Glossier.

step_1.title: Cleanse
step_1.product: DUA by Augustinus Bader Balancing Cream Cleanser
step_1.description:
Start with a gentle cleanse. In her newest Vogue Beauty Secrets routine, Dua says cleansing is her first step, and she introduces her Balancing Cream Cleanser from DUA by Augustinus Bader.

Harper's Bazaar also notes that cleansing and restoring the skin are central to her approach, especially after shows or travel.

step_2.title: Vitamin Serum
step_2.description: Layer this before the glow complex. In Vogue, Dua uses iS Clinical's Pro-Heal Serum Advance+ before applying her DUA Supercharged Glow Complex.

step_3.title: Glow Serum
step_3.product: DUA by Augustinus Bader Supercharged Glow Complex
step_3.description:
Use a couple of pumps after serum. Dua says this has passed the real test for her: seeing how her skin reacts on tour.

In Harper's Bazaar, she calls Supercharged Glow Complex her favorite from the line and says it gives skin an effervescent, dewy feeling.

step_4.title: Moisturizer
step_4.product: DUA by Augustinus Bader Renewal Cream
step_4.description:
Apply after Supercharged Glow Complex. DUA says Renewal Cream can be used morning and night on the face, neck, and chest.

In Vogue, Dua points out the cream's natural pink tone from vitamin B12, which she says helps protect the skin barrier.

step_5.title: SPF
step_5.product: EltaMD UV Clear Broad-Spectrum SPF 46
step_5.description: Finish morning skin care with sunscreen. Vogue's earlier Dua product roundup says sunscreen is non-negotiable for her and names EltaMD UV Clear Broad-Spectrum SPF 46 as her product of choice.

step_6.title: Mist
step_6.description: Use as a hydrating refresh during the day. Vogue's product roundup says Dua relies on Caudalie Beauty Elixir to keep her complexion hydrated and soothed throughout the day.

step_7.title: Lip Treatment
step_7.description:
Keep this handy when lips need richer conditioning. Vogue names Tatcha's jelly-textured Kissu Lip Mask first among Dua's lip products.

For a lighter, more affordable option from the same product roundup, she has also used Glossier Balm Dotcom.

step_1.title: Remove Makeup
step_1.product: Bioderma Sensibio H2O Micellar Water
step_1.description:
Use on a cotton pad to remove makeup and reset the skin. In Vogue, Dua compares a swipe of Bioderma Micellar Water to pressing the reset button on a laptop.

In an earlier Vogue product roundup, she was also reported to use Pai Light Work Rosehip Cleansing Oil to remove makeup, pollution, and SPF.

step_2.title: Cleanse
step_2.product: DUA by Augustinus Bader Balancing Cream Cleanser
step_2.description:
Follow makeup removal with the Balancing Cream Cleanser. Dua told Harper's Bazaar her one skincare rule is that she always removes makeup and cleanses before bed.

She also says that cleansing and restoring skin is even more important after a show or after traveling.

step_3.title: Vitamin Serum
step_3.description: Apply before the glow step if your skin tolerates using it twice daily. In the Vogue Beauty Secrets routine, Dua layers iS Clinical's Pro-Heal Serum Advance+ before Supercharged Glow Complex.

step_4.title: Glow Serum
step_4.product: DUA by Augustinus Bader Supercharged Glow Complex
step_4.description: Use this as the lightweight glow and treatment layer. Dua says it gives a clean-girl highlight effect, and Harper's Bazaar quotes her calling it her can-not-live-without product from the line.

step_5.title: Moisturizer
step_5.product: DUA by Augustinus Bader Renewal Cream
step_5.description:
Use as the final daily moisturizer step, over Supercharged Glow Complex. DUA recommends Renewal Cream morning and night.

Before launching DUA, Vogue reported that Dua also used Augustinus Bader The Rich Cream and Medik8 Advanced Night Restore as a nighttime cream.

step_6.title: Eye Cream
step_6.product: Augustinus Bader The Rich Eye Cream
step_6.description: Use around the eye area if you want a dedicated eye step. Vogue's earlier product roundup says Dua used Augustinus Bader's The Rich Eye Cream and was also loyal to the brand's eye patches for travel puffiness.

step_7.title: Hydrating Mask
step_7.description: Use occasionally when skin feels dehydrated, before night cream. Vogue says to make like Dua and use Sarah Chapman Skinesis 3D Moisture Infusion Mask when skin is feeling the dehydrating effects of sun exposure or daily grind.

step_8.title: Lip Mask
step_8.description:
Finish with a richer lip mask at night. Vogue says Dua keeps conditioning lip products on hand and names Tatcha's jelly-textured Kissu Lip Mask first.

For a lighter option she has also used Glossier Balm Dotcom.

name: Selena Gomez's Routine
point_description: A luxe, acne-conscious routine centered on gentle makeup removal, hydration, sun protection, and lupus-sensitive skin.

sources.label: Page Six 2023
sources.headline: The Ultimate Guide to All of Selena Gomez's Favorite Beauty Products
sources.summary: A product roundup naming Gomez-used skincare including La Mer, Dermalogica, Bioderma, Laneige, Tatcha, Drunk Elephant, Mario Badescu, and iS Clinical.

sources.label: Allure 2023
sources.headline: Selena Gomez Shut Down a TikTok User Who Made Fun of Her Lupus-Related Hand Tremors
sources.summary: Allure covers Gomez's TikTok skincare routine, noting La Mer, Laneige, Dermalogica, Tatcha, micellar water, and her serum makeup-removal tip.

sources.label: Teen Vogue 2022
sources.headline: Selena Gomez Casually Dropped Her Skin Care Routine on TikTok
sources.summary: Teen Vogue recaps a luxe TikTok routine with Evian mist, La Mer cleanser and cream, Dior serum and eye serum, Peter Thomas Roth eye patches, and eos lip balm.

sources.label: Vogue 2021
sources.headline: Watch Selena Gomez Do Her Going-Out Makeup Routine
sources.summary: Her second Beauty Secrets video starts with cucumber eye patches and Tatcha The Dewy Serum before the Rare Beauty makeup steps.

sources.label: Vogue 2020
sources.headline: Selena Gomez on Acne, Mental Health, and Her Day-to-Night Makeup Strategy
sources.summary: Gomez discusses acne, skin care as self-care, Tatcha Dewy Skin Moisturizer, and Drunk Elephant sunscreen for lupus-sensitive sun exposure.

step_1.title: Cleanse
step_1.product: iS Clinical Cleansing Complex
step_1.description:
Start with a gentle cleanse. Page Six's 2023 roundup says iS Clinical Cleansing Complex appeared in Selena's pre-flight TikTok routine, so it gets priority here as the newer source-backed cleanser.

In her 2022 TikTok routine, Teen Vogue says she used La Mer The Cleansing Foam, applying a small amount and wetting it down with Evian spray.

step_2.title: Tone
step_2.description:
Mist or press on after cleansing. Page Six names Dermalogica Multi-Active Toner among Selena's must-haves.

She has also spritzed Mario Badescu Facial Spray with Aloe, Herbs and Rosewater in a pre-flight morning routine, and Teen Vogue notes she used Evian facial spray in her 2022 TikTok skincare routine.

step_3.title: Serum
step_3.description:
Apply after toner as a daytime serum step. Page Six's 2023 roundup names Dermalogica Smart Response Serum as one of Selena's used products.

In her older 2022 TikTok skincare routine, Teen Vogue says she used Dior Capture Totale Super Potent Age-Defying Intense Serum.

step_4.title: Moisturizer
step_4.product: Laneige Radian-C Cream
step_4.description:
Use as the daytime moisturizer step. Page Six says Selena reached for Laneige Radian-C Cream in a January 2023 TikTok, so this takes priority over older moisturizer mentions.

She has also used Tatcha The Dewy Skin Cream, which she called thick and yummy in Vogue, and La Mer The Moisturizing Soft Cream in her 2022 TikTok routine.

step_5.title: SPF
step_5.product: Drunk Elephant Umbra Sheer Physical Daily Defense SPF 30
step_5.description: Use as the final morning skincare step. In Vogue, Selena says she likes putting on sunscreen because it keeps skin looking fresh and because lupus makes sun exposure difficult for her.

step_6.title: Lip Balm
step_6.description: Finish with lip balm. Teen Vogue says Selena ended her 2022 TikTok skincare routine with eos Lip Balm, though the exact flavor was not confirmed.

step_1.title: Remove Makeup
step_1.product: La Mer The Concentrate Serum
step_1.description: Massage over makeup before cleansing. Allure quotes Selena's TikTok caption saying to use any serum to take off makeup because it breaks it up nicely, and Page Six identifies La Mer The Concentrate Serum as the luxe serum she used in that routine.

step_2.title: Micellar Water
step_2.description:
Use on a cotton pad or sponge after the serum step. Allure notes that Selena used micellar water in her TikTok routine, and Page Six identifies the product as Bioderma Sensibio H2O Micellar Water.

Selena also said to use a sponge to wipe the eyes so the eye area is treated delicately when removing makeup.

step_3.title: Cleanse
step_3.description:
Follow makeup removal with cleanser. In her exact 2022 TikTok routine, Teen Vogue says Selena used La Mer The Cleansing Foam, wetting the cleanser further with Evian facial spray.

For a newer morning or travel cleanse, Page Six later noted that iS Clinical Cleansing Complex appeared in her pre-flight TikTok routine.

step_4.title: Retinol Serum
step_4.product: Dermalogica Dynamic Skin Retinol Serum
step_4.description: Use at night only, and introduce slowly. Page Six names Dermalogica Dynamic Skin Retinol Serum among Selena's used Dermalogica products.

step_5.title: Serum
step_5.product: Dior Capture Totale Super Potent Age-Defying Intense Serum
step_5.description: On non-retinol nights, or if skipping the retinol step, use a hydrating serum. Teen Vogue says Selena used Dior Capture Totale Super Potent Age-Defying Intense Serum in her 2022 TikTok skincare routine.

step_6.title: Eye Treatment
step_6.product: Peter Thomas Roth 24K Gold Pure Luxury Lift & Firm Hydra-Gel Eye Patches
step_6.description:
Use when you want a more pampering eye step. Teen Vogue says Selena finished her 2022 TikTok routine with Peter Thomas Roth 24K Gold Hydra-Gel Eye Patches, leaving them on briefly before removing them.

Earlier in that same routine, she also used Dior Capture Totale Super Potent Eye Serum.

step_7.title: Moisturizer
step_7.product: La Mer The Moisturizing Soft Cream
step_7.description:
Seal everything in with moisturizer. Teen Vogue says Selena applied La Mer The Moisturizing Soft Cream to her face and neck in her 2022 TikTok routine.

For a newer Selena-used moisturizer from 2023, she has also reached for Laneige Radian-C Cream.

step_8.title: Lip Balm
step_8.description: Finish with lip balm. Teen Vogue says Selena completed her 2022 TikTok routine with eos Lip Balm, though the exact flavor was not confirmed.

name: Zendaya's Routine
point_description: A light, less-is-more routine built around gentle cleansing, moisturizer, SPF, lip repair, and occasional masks.

sources.label: The Sun 2024
sources.headline: Zendaya's esthetician reveals 3 'core steps' in her skincare routine
sources.summary: A 2024 routine source citing Zendaya's esthetician Vanessa Marc, with core steps of cleanser, moisturizer, SPF, plus toner, lip repair, and masks.

sources.label: Glamour 2020
sources.headline: Zendaya Swears By This New Mascara for Insanely Long Lashes
sources.summary: Zendaya tells Glamour SPF is her nonnegotiable, naming Lancôme UV Expert Aqua Gel SPF 50 and Aquaphor as products she keeps with her.

sources.label: Teen Vogue 2020
sources.headline: Zendaya's 3 Go-To Beauty Products Are All Under $40
sources.summary: Teen Vogue recaps Zendaya's Glamour interview, emphasizing her SPF-first rule and her always-with-her Aquaphor.

sources.label: Allure 2016
sources.headline: The Skin-Care Product Zendaya Uses for Just About Everything
sources.summary: Allure highlights Zendaya's Aquaphor tip for chapped lips and dry heels before bed.

sources.label: Teen Vogue 2016
sources.headline: Zendaya's Skincare Routine Review
sources.summary: Teen Vogue reports Zendaya's earlier three-step, less-is-more routine: makeup-removing wipes, Clinique moisturizing gel, and Carmex lip balm.

step_1.title: Cleanse
step_1.product: SheaMoisture African Black Soap Cleansing Bar
step_1.description: Start with a gentle cleanse. The 2024 source says Zendaya's esthetician advises a cleanser that does not further dry out the skin, and names SheaMoisture African Black Soap Cleansing Bar as one of her favorites.

step_2.title: Tone
step_2.product: Thayers Alcohol-Free Rose Petal Witch Hazel Facial Toner
step_2.description: Use after cleansing. The 2024 source says toner can be a good addition after cleanser and names Thayers Witch Hazel Rose Petal Toner as one of Zendaya's top picks.

step_3.title: Moisturizer
step_3.description: Apply over slightly damp skin. The 2024 source says Zendaya prioritizes moisturizing because she has sensitive skin, and her esthetician suggests moisturizing over damp skin to improve efficacy.

step_4.title: SPF
step_4.product: Lancôme UV Expert Aquagel Defense Primer & Moisturizer SPF 50
step_4.description:
Finish morning skin care with sunscreen. Zendaya told Glamour that SPF is her ultimate nonnegotiable and that Lancôme UV Expert Aqua Gel SPF 50 is great on its own and under makeup.

The 2024 source also names this SPF and says she consistently applies sunscreen; it mentions CeraVe AM Facial Moisturizing Lotion SPF 30 as a more affordable moisturizer-with-SPF option.

step_5.title: Lip Repair
step_5.product: Aquaphor Lip Repair Ointment
step_5.description:
Use whenever lips feel dry. The 2024 source says Zendaya's esthetician shared that she likes to have Aquaphor Lip Repair Ointment on hand whenever needed.

Zendaya also told Glamour she carries a tube of Aquaphor with her at all times.

step_1.title: Remove Makeup
step_1.product: SheaMoisture African Black Soap Clarifying Facial Wipes
step_1.description:
Use as a quick first pass when wearing makeup. The 2024 source names SheaMoisture African Black Soap Clarifying Facial Wipes alongside the cleansing bar.

Teen Vogue reported Zendaya's older three-step routine used Aveeno Ultra-Calming Makeup Removing Wipes, but that exact product is not available now.

step_2.title: Cleanse
step_2.product: SheaMoisture African Black Soap Cleansing Bar
step_2.description: Cleanse after makeup removal, keeping the routine simple. The 2024 source frames cleanser, moisturizer, and SPF as the core steps in Zendaya's routine and says she prefers a less-is-more approach.

step_3.title: Moisturizer
step_3.description:
Moisturize after cleansing, ideally while skin is still a little damp. The 2024 source says Zendaya prefers more natural-feeling options like Mario Badescu Oil Free Moisturizer with green tea extract and aloe vera.

Her older Teen Vogue routine used Clinique Dramatically Different Moisturizing Gel as the moisturizer step.

step_4.title: Mask
step_4.product: La Mer The Intensive Revitalizing Mask
step_4.description:
Use occasionally, not nightly. The 2024 source says cleanser, moisturizer, and SPF are the core routine, then names masks among the extra products Zendaya may use.

That source also names Origins Clear Improvement Active Charcoal Mask and Lancôme Advanced Génifique Hydrogel Melting Mask as mask options.

step_5.title: Lip & Dry Spots
step_5.product: Aquaphor Healing Ointment
step_5.description:
Finish with Aquaphor on lips or dry areas. Allure says Zendaya uses Aquaphor before bed on dry heels and chapped lips, saying it keeps her lips moisturized and looks like clear gloss.

Her older Teen Vogue routine named Carmex Moisturizing Lip Balm, but newer sources point to Aquaphor.

name: Kate Moss's Routine
point_description: A restorative routine built around ice, rose water, rich moisture, gua sha, sunscreen, and lip care.

sources.label: Vogue 2022
sources.headline: Kate Moss's Guide to Restorative Wellness and Cool-Girl Beauty
sources.summary: Moss shares her Beauty Secrets routine: cleanser, rose water, Cosmoss Face Cream, gua sha, sunscreen, Laneige lip mask, and Golden Nectar.

sources.label: Vogue 2022
sources.headline: Kate Moss Opens Up About Her New Wellness Brand and the Concept of Compassionate Self-Care
sources.summary: A deeper Cosmoss profile naming the foaming cleanser, face cream, pink clay, bakuchiol, CBD, and Golden Nectar oil.

sources.label: Woman & Home 2025
sources.headline: What sunscreen does Kate Moss rely on for her protected, healthy-looking complexion?
sources.summary: Identifies Moss's Vogue Beauty Secrets SPF as La Roche-Posay Anthelios Ultra-Light Invisible Fluid SPF 30 and notes her rose water and Laneige lip mask.

sources.label: SELF 2016
sources.headline: Kate Moss Reveals Her 'Insane' Beauty Trick For Perfect Morning Skin
sources.summary: Covers Moss's W magazine ice-and-cucumber face dunk, which she says wakes skin up by bringing blood to the surface.

sources.label: The Scottish Sun 2025
sources.headline: Kate Moss' wellness firm Cosmoss goes BUST with staggering 7-figure debt
sources.summary: Reports Cosmoss has gone into liquidation and the site is no longer taking orders, so the routine links current similar products for discontinued Cosmoss items.

step_1.title: Ice Facial
step_1.product: Ice Water & Cucumber
step_1.description: On mornings when skin needs waking up, use a bowl of ice water with cucumber slices and briefly dunk the face. SELF reports that Moss learned the old-school trick from Mommie Dearest and says it works because it brings blood to the surface.

step_2.title: Cleanse
step_2.product: La Roche-Posay Toleriane Hydrating Gentle Cleanser
step_2.description:
Cleanse before toning. In Vogue, Moss follows her morning tea with cleanser; the Cosmoss profile says the original Cosmoss cleanser was a foaming cleanser with pink clay and bakuchiol.

Cosmoss is no longer available, so this links a similar gentle current cleanser from La Roche-Posay, a brand Moss is source-linked to through her sunscreen.

step_3.title: Tone
step_3.product: Officina Profumo-Farmaceutica di Santa Maria Novella Acqua di Rose
step_3.description: Use after cleansing. Vogue says Moss follows cleanser with rose water toner, and Woman & Home identifies the toner as Officina Profumo-Farmaceutica di Santa Maria Novella Acqua di Rose.

step_4.title: Moisturizer
step_4.product: La Roche-Posay Lipikar AP+M Triple Repair Moisturizing Cream
step_4.description:
Massage moisturizer into the skin. In Vogue, Moss used Cosmoss Face Cream and described it as very healing; the article says it was infused with oat moss and CBD and delicate enough that friends with eczema could use it.

Because Cosmoss is no longer available, this links a similar current rich cream from La Roche-Posay, a brand Moss is source-linked to through her sunscreen, while preserving the original product Moss used.

step_5.title: Gua Sha
step_5.product: Gua Sha Facial Tool
step_5.description: Glide a gua sha tool across the face after moisturizer or oil. Vogue says Moss uses gua sha for lymphatic drainage and notes it is a sculpting technique she learned on the job.

step_6.title: SPF
step_6.product: La Roche-Posay Anthelios Ultra Light Fluid Facial Sunscreen SPF 60
step_6.description:
Finish morning skin care with sunscreen. Vogue says sunscreen was a newer addition to Moss's routine because her daughter Lila tells her to wear it, and Woman & Home identifies the product in the video as La Roche-Posay Anthelios Ultra-Light Invisible Fluid SPF 30.

The linked product is the similar current U.S. Anthelios Ultra Light Fluid SPF 60.

step_7.title: Lip Mask
step_7.description: Use on lips as the final skin-care step. Vogue says Moss applied the Laneige lip mask at her daughter Lila's recommendation, and Woman & Home notes she called it good while hydrating her lips.

step_1.title: Cleanse
step_1.product: La Roche-Posay Toleriane Hydrating Gentle Cleanser
step_1.description:
Cleanse gently at night, especially after makeup. In the Cosmoss profile, Moss says she is obsessed with washing her face, likely from years in the makeup chair.

Her original Cosmoss foaming cleanser is no longer available, so this links a similar gentle current cleanser from La Roche-Posay, a brand Moss is source-linked to through her sunscreen.

step_2.title: Tone
step_2.product: Officina Profumo-Farmaceutica di Santa Maria Novella Acqua di Rose
step_2.description: Press or sweep on after cleansing. Vogue places rose water toner directly after cleansing in Moss's routine.

step_3.title: Moisturizer
step_3.product: La Roche-Posay Lipikar AP+M Triple Repair Moisturizing Cream
step_3.description:
Use a rich moisturizer after toner. Moss's source-used Cosmoss Face Cream is no longer available; Vogue described it as healing, delicate in scent, and infused with oat moss and CBD.

This linked cream is a current similar option from La Roche-Posay, a brand Moss is source-linked to through her sunscreen, while the description preserves the original product Moss used.

step_4.title: Face Oil
step_4.product: Pai Rosehip Bioregenerate Face Oil
step_4.description:
Use a few drops as an optional oil step after cream or instead of cream when skin feels dry. Vogue says Moss used Cosmoss Golden Nectar as a tincture and praised its anti-inflammatory, stress-relieving feel, whether ingested or applied topically as a serum.

Cosmoss Golden Nectar is no longer available and included CBD, so this links a similar current facial oil while noting the original.

step_5.title: Lip Mask
step_5.product: Laneige Lip Sleeping Mask
step_5.description: Finish with the Laneige lip mask. Moss used it in her Vogue routine after sunscreen and said it came recommended by Lila; it also fits as a night lip step because it is a sleeping mask.

name: Martha Stewart's Routine
point_description: A disciplined glow routine built around warm towels, Mario Badescu cleansing, eye cream, sunscreen, facial mist, and rich night care.

sources.label: Vogue 2026
sources.headline: Martha Stewart Breaks Beauty Rules Because She Likes to Glow
sources.summary: Her Beauty Secrets routine names Mario Badescu A.H.A. Botanical Body Soap, Elm A30 Elemental Night Cream, Alastin HydraTint, and her glow-first philosophy.

sources.label: Vogue 2024
sources.headline: Martha Stewart's Skin-Care Routine, According to Her Dermatologists
sources.summary: Her dermatologist-backed regimen includes a morning sheet mask, Clé de Peau eye cream, Alastin sunscreen, Mario Badescu facial spray, and a bespoke serum.

sources.label: Page Six 2024
sources.headline: Martha Stewart says this skincare spray is so refreshing
sources.summary: A focused source for her Mario Badescu Facial Spray with Aloe, Herbs and Rosewater, which she called refreshing on hot summer days.

sources.label: Allure 2013
sources.headline: Martha Stewart's Beauty Routine, Revealed!
sources.summary: An older detailed routine naming Yon-Ka Gommage, Mario Badescu A.H.A. Botanical Body Soap, Crème de la Mer, Clé de Peau La Crème, and her hot-cloth night cleanse.

step_1.title: Warm Towel
step_1.product: Warm Face Cloth
step_1.description: Start with a warm towel. In her Vogue Beauty Secrets routine, Stewart begins with a hot face towel before cleansing, then follows later with a cold towel to make skin feel fresh.

step_2.title: Cleanse
step_2.product: Mario Badescu A.H.A. Botanical Body Soap
step_2.description:
Use a small amount as the cleanse step. In Vogue, Stewart says this is the soap she uses on her face, even though it is sold as a body soap.

Allure also reported that she used Mario Badescu A.H.A. Botanical Body Soap in her routine, alongside other soaps.

step_3.title: Sheet Mask
step_3.description: Use a hydrating morning sheet mask when available. Vogue says Stewart's daily routine includes a morning sheet mask, with some custom-made and formulated for her by Dr. Dhaval Bhanusali.

step_4.title: Eye Cream
step_4.product: Clé de Peau Beauté Eye Contour Cream Supreme
step_4.description: Tap around the eye area after mask or serum. Vogue's dermatologist-backed routine names Clé de Peau's Intensive Eye Contour Cream as part of Stewart's daily regimen.

step_5.title: Moisturizer
step_5.product: Elm Biosciences A30 Elemental Night Cream
step_5.description: Apply to face, neck, and décolleté. In her Vogue Beauty Secrets routine, Stewart uses her Elm Bioscience A30 Elemental Night Cream in the morning before sunscreen.

step_6.title: SPF
step_6.product: Alastin HydraTint Pro Mineral Broad Spectrum Sunscreen SPF 36
step_6.description: Apply generously to face, neck, décolleté, and any exposed skin. Vogue says Stewart mixes Alastin HydraTint Pro Mineral Broad Spectrum Sunscreen SPF 36 with moisturizer, and her dermatologist emphasizes her disciplined sun protection.

step_7.title: Facial Mist
step_7.product: Mario Badescu Facial Spray with Aloe, Herbs and Rosewater
step_7.description: Mist throughout the day when skin needs calming or refreshment. Vogue says Stewart uses Mario Badescu Facial Spray throughout the day to calm the skin, and Page Six reports she called the rosewater spray refreshing on a hot summer day.

step_1.title: Steam Cleanse
step_1.product: Warm Steamy Face Cloth
step_1.description: Before bed, loosen makeup and sunscreen with a hot, steamy face cloth. Allure says Stewart uses this before washing her face very well.

step_2.title: Cleanse
step_2.product: Mario Badescu A.H.A. Botanical Body Soap
step_2.description: Follow the steamy cloth with cleanser. Allure says Stewart washes with silicone soap or a cleanser before bed; her newer Vogue routine specifically shows Mario Badescu A.H.A. Botanical Body Soap as the soap she uses on her face.

step_3.title: Serum
step_3.description:
Use a targeted serum step before cream. Vogue says Stewart's dermatologist creates a bespoke serum based on Visia-CR Skin Analysis, with hydrating, nourishing, and antioxidant-focused ingredients because sun protection is her main concern.

Her own Elm Biosciences A30 Elemental Serum is the closest source-backed current serum from Stewart's skincare line.

step_4.title: Night Cream
step_4.product: Elm Biosciences A30 Elemental Night Cream
step_4.description: Apply as the main night cream. Stewart uses the A30 Elemental Night Cream in her Vogue routine, and Allure says her bedtime routine ends with slathering on moisturizer and remembering arms, legs, and hands.

step_5.title: Rich Cream
step_5.product: Clé de Peau Beauté La Crème
step_5.description:
Use a richer cream when skin feels chapped or dry. Allure says Stewart used either Crème de la Mer or Clé de Peau Beauté La Crème, and that she was not opposed to using face creams on the body.

She has also mentioned Crème de la Mer as another rich moisturizer option.

name: Scarlett Johansson's Routine
point_description: A sensitive-skin routine built around The Outset cleanser, prep serum, moisturizer, sunscreen, night cream, oil, balm, plus occasional makeup removal and dermaplaning.

sources.label: Daily Beast 2026
sources.headline: Scarlett Johansson, 41, Ditches Her Usual Makeup for Bare-Faced Video
sources.summary: A current summer routine source showing Johansson applying The Outset Hydrasheer SPF 30 and Lip Oasis Glossy Treatment.

sources.label: Page Six 2025
sources.headline: Score an exclusive deal on Scarlett Johansson's The Outset x Jurassic World Rebirth skincare set
sources.summary: Covers Johansson's on-set skincare trio: Gentle Micellar Antioxidant Cleanser, Firming Vegan Collagen Prep Serum, and Nourishing Squalane Daily Moisturizer.

sources.label: NYT 2024
sources.headline: Scarlett Johansson on Beauty, Skin Care and Makeup
sources.summary: Johansson describes her morning The Outset cleanser, prep serum, moisturizer, sunscreen, nighttime cleanser and night cream, plus Bi-Facil makeup remover and Tweezerman dermaplaning.

sources.label: Allure 2023
sources.headline: Scarlett Johansson's Entire Beauty Routine, From Head to Toe
sources.summary: The core routine source: morning Daily Essentials Regimen, night cleanser and night cream, occasional oil, Barrier Balm, SPF, melasma, acne history, and sensitivity.

sources.label: Vogue 2022
sources.headline: Scarlett Johansson Secured Her Superhero Status by Taking on the Hollywood Machine. Her Next Feat? A Clean Skin-Care Line
sources.summary: A launch profile explaining The Outset's less-is-more philosophy, cleanser, prep serum, moisturizer, night cream, eye cream, lip treatment, and sensitive-skin focus.

step_1.title: Cleanse
step_1.product: The Outset Gentle Micellar Antioxidant Cleanser
step_1.description:
Start with cleanser. In the New York Times, Johansson says that in the morning she washes her face with The Outset's Gentle Micellar Antioxidant Cleanser.

Allure also says she uses The Outset's three-step Daily Essentials Regimen in the morning, and Page Six identifies this cleanser as part of her on-set Skin Survival Kit.

step_2.title: Prep Serum
step_2.product: The Outset Firming Vegan Collagen Prep Serum
step_2.description:
Apply after cleansing. In the New York Times, Johansson says she follows cleanser with The Outset Firming Vegan Collagen Prep Serum.

Allure says she uses the Prep Serum in the morning, and again in the middle of the day if she showers or washes her skin. Page Six also names this as one of the trio she used while filming.

step_3.title: Moisturizer
step_3.product: The Outset Nourishing Squalane Daily Moisturizer
step_3.description:
Use as the day cream step. In the New York Times, Johansson says she applies The Outset Nourishing Squalane Daily Moisturizer after the prep serum.

Allure says she finishes her morning three-step regimen with day cream, and Page Six says this moisturizer was part of her on-set trio.

step_4.title: SPF
step_4.product: The Outset Hydrasheer 100% Mineral Sunscreen SPF 30
step_4.description:
Apply generously as the final daytime skin-care step. In the New York Times, Johansson says her last morning step is The Outset's sunscreen, calling it super hydrating because it gives both protection and skin-care benefits.

The Daily Beast later identifies her sunscreen as The Outset Hydrasheer 100% Mineral Sunscreen SPF 30 in a summer routine video. Allure also notes that she uses SPF daily because she has melasma.

step_5.title: Lip Treatment
step_5.product: The Outset Lip Oasis Glossy Treatment
step_5.description: Use after sunscreen or whenever lips need gloss and care. The Daily Beast says Johansson applied Lip Oasis Glossy Treatment in the Skinny Dip shade in her summer routine video.

step_1.title: Makeup Remove
step_1.product: Lancôme Bi-Facil Double-Action Eye Makeup Remover
step_1.description: Use when removing filming or long-wear makeup before cleansing. In the New York Times, Johansson says she has used Lancôme Bi-Facil Double Action Makeup Remover forever because her skin is very sensitive and it does not burn while removing all of her makeup after filming.

step_2.title: Cleanse
step_2.product: The Outset Gentle Micellar Antioxidant Cleanser
step_2.description:
Wash the face at night. In the New York Times, Johansson says that at night she uses The Outset cleanser before night cream.

Allure also says she washes with this cleanser before her night cream, and describes herself as a creature of habit.

step_3.title: Night Cream
step_3.product: The Outset Restorative Niacinamide Night Cream
step_3.description:
Apply after cleansing as the usual night moisturizer. In the New York Times, Johansson says she uses The Outset Restorative Niacinamide Night Cream at night.

Allure also says she usually uses The Outset Night Cream at night.

step_4.title: Dermaplane
step_4.product: Tweezerman Facial Razor
step_4.description: Use occasionally, not nightly, on clean skin with a careful light touch. In the New York Times, Johansson says she wishes she knew about dermaplaning sooner and uses a Tweezerman Facial Razor because her skin feels so soft afterward.

step_5.title: Face Oil
step_5.product: The Outset Ultralight Moisture-Boosting Botanical Oil
step_5.description: Use occasionally instead of, or alongside, night cream when skin wants oil. Allure says Johansson sometimes uses just The Outset Moisture-Boosting Oil at night.

step_6.title: Barrier Balm
step_6.product: The Outset Botanical Barrier Rescue Balm
step_6.description:
Use on lips, cuticles, knuckles, elbows, flyaways, or anywhere dry. In the New York Times, Johansson says The Outset Botanical Barrier Rescue Balm started as a lip balm, but she used it on cuticles and flyaways, and in summer uses it as a moisturizer, lip balm, and everything balm.

Allure also says the Barrier Balm started as a lip balm and became an everywhere balm.

name: Dr. Sam Ellis's Routine
point_description: A dermatologist-style routine with hydrating layers, peptides, eye cream, sunscreen, double cleansing, LED, prescription treatment, and overnight repair.

sources.label: YouTube 2025
sources.headline: My Real Routine: What I Tell Patients vs. What I Do Myself | Dr. Sam Ellis
sources.summary: Ellis's most recent personal-routine source, covering real-life hydration, peptide serum, sun protection, retinoids, exfoliation, eye cream, and devices.

sources.label: YouTube 2023 PM
sources.headline: Get Ready for Bed with Me! Dermatologist's Nighttime Skincare Routine | Dr. Sam Ellis
sources.summary: Ellis walks through her nighttime routine: cleansing balm, second cleanser, red-light mask, prescription step, eye cream, and overnight moisturizer.

sources.label: YouTube 2023 AM
sources.headline: Dermatologist Explains How to Layer Products in Your Morning Skincare Routine | Dr. Sam Ellis
sources.summary: Ellis explains her morning layering order with cleanser, exfoliant, vitamin C, peptides, azelaic acid, eye cream, moisturizer, sunscreen, and SPF lip balm.

step_1.title: Cleanse
step_1.product: SkinMedica AHA/BHA Exfoliating Cleanser
step_1.description:
Use as the cleanse or exfoliating-cleanse step when skin can tolerate acids. In her 2025 real-routine video, Ellis discusses exfoliation and includes SkinMedica AHA/BHA Exfoliating Cleanser.

In her earlier morning layering video, she used Cetaphil Hydrating Foaming Cream Face Cleanser as the gentler cleanser option.

step_2.title: Toner
step_2.description:
Pat on after cleansing as a light hydrating or brightening layer. In her 2025 real-routine video, Ellis includes medicube Age-R Glutathione Glow Toner.

She also mentions I'm From Rice Toner in the same video.

step_3.title: Hydrating Serum
step_3.description: Layer this before richer serums or cream for hydration. In her 2025 real-routine video, Ellis includes Prequel Multi-Quench in the hydration portion of her routine.

step_4.title: Peptide Serum
step_4.product: Medik8 Liquid Peptides Advanced MP
step_4.description:
Apply after hydrating layers and before moisturizer. In her 2025 real-routine video, Ellis includes Medik8 Liquid Peptides Advanced MP while discussing peptide serum benefits.

She also mentions MAELOVE Peptide Squad in the same video.

step_5.title: Eye Cream
step_5.product: NEOCUTIS Lumière Firm Riche Illuminating & Tightening Eye Cream
step_5.description: Tap a small amount around the eye area before moisturizer or sunscreen. In her 2025 real-routine video, Ellis includes NEOCUTIS Lumière Firm Riche; in her morning layering video, she treats eye cream as its own step.

step_6.title: Moisturizer
step_6.description: Use moisturizer after serum layers to support the barrier before sunscreen. In her morning layering video, Ellis places moisturizer after eye cream and before sunscreen.

step_7.title: SPF
step_7.product: PURITO Daily Soft Touch Sunscreen SPF 50+ PA++++
step_7.description: Apply as the final face step in the morning. In her morning layering video, Ellis uses this sunscreen after moisturizer; in her 2025 real-routine video, she also discusses sun protection strategy.

step_8.title: Lip SPF
step_8.product: O'Keeffe's Lip Repair SPF 35 Lip Balm
step_8.description: Finish with SPF on the lips. In her morning layering video, Ellis includes O'Keeffe's Lip Repair SPF 35 Lip Balm as the SPF lip step.

step_1.title: First Cleanse
step_1.product: Elemis Pro-Collagen Cleansing Balm
step_1.description: Use as the first cleanse to break down makeup and sunscreen. In her nighttime routine video, Ellis shares how she removes makeup and includes Elemis Pro-Collagen Cleansing Balm.

step_2.title: Cleanse
step_2.description: Follow with a second cleanse. In her nighttime routine video, Ellis uses iS Clinical Cleansing Complex after the cleansing balm.

step_3.title: LED Mask
step_3.description:
Use on clean, dry skin before leave-on treatments. In her nighttime routine video, Ellis uses the Omnilux Contour Face LED Mask before the rest of her leave-on skin care.

In her newer 2025 real-routine video, she also mentions a CurrentBody LED Red Light Therapy Face Mask as another device she discussed later.

step_4.title: Prescription
step_4.product: Apostrophe Prescription Skincare
step_4.description: Apply the prescribed treatment as directed by the prescribing clinician. In her nighttime routine video, Ellis uses an Apostrophe prescription step; in her 2025 real-routine video, she also discusses retinoids for anti-aging.

step_5.title: Eye Cream
step_5.product: NEOCUTIS Lumière Firm Riche Illuminating & Tightening Eye Cream
step_5.description: Tap around the orbital area after prescription treatment or before moisturizer, depending on tolerance. In her nighttime routine video, Ellis uses NEOCUTIS Lumière Firm as her eye cream step.

step_6.title: Moisturizer
step_6.product: Tatcha Indigo Overnight Repair Serum in Cream Treatment
step_6.description: Use as the final moisturizer at night. In her nighttime routine video, Ellis finishes with Tatcha Indigo Overnight Repair Serum in Cream Treatment as her moisturizer step.

name: Tyla's Routine
point_description: A simple glow-focused routine built around cleanser, face mist, rich moisturizer, sunscreen, petroleum jelly, and a lip sleeping mask.

sources.label: Vogue 2024
sources.headline: Tyla's All-in-One Wellness, Skin Care, and Makeup Routine
sources.summary: Tyla shares her wellness, skin-care, and makeup routine, including Youth To The People cleanser, Caudalie mist, Weleda Skin Food, Black Girl Sunscreen, Vaseline, and Laneige Lip Sleeping Mask.

step_1.title: Cleanse
step_1.product: Youth To The People Superfood Gentle Antioxidant Cleanser
step_1.description:
Start with cleanser. In Vogue, Tyla uses Youth To The People's Superfood Gentle Antioxidant Cleanser while pointing out a blemish on her forehead.

She says TikTok is where she finds her skin-care tips, so this is a simple cleanse-first routine rather than a highly technical one.

step_2.title: Face Mist
step_2.description: Mist after cleansing for a refreshing layer before moisturizer. Vogue says Tyla uses a Caudalie face mist as part of the skin-care section of her routine.

step_3.title: Moisturizer
step_3.product: Weleda Skin Food Original Ultra-Rich Cream
step_3.description: Press on a small amount where skin needs richness or extra cushion. Vogue says Tyla uses Weleda Skin Food while tending to her skin, including the blemish she calls out at the start of the routine.

step_4.title: SPF
step_4.product: Black Girl Sunscreen Moisturizing Sunscreen Lotion SPF 30
step_4.description: Use as the final daytime face step. Vogue's product lineup for Tyla's Beauty Secrets routine includes Black Girl Sunscreen Moisturizing Sunscreen Lotion SPF 30.

step_5.title: Lip Balm
step_5.product: Vaseline 100% Pure Petroleum Jelly
step_5.description: Use a tiny amount on lips or dry spots. Vogue notes that Tyla's lip balm is drugstore Vaseline, even though her personal pot is decorated with sparkle.

step_1.title: Cleanse
step_1.product: Youth To The People Superfood Gentle Antioxidant Cleanser
step_1.description: Use again at night to remove the day before moisturizer. Vogue does not split Tyla's routine into AM and PM, so this repeats her source-used cleanser as the sensible evening cleanse step.

step_2.title: Face Mist
step_2.description: Mist after cleansing if skin wants a refreshed, dewy layer. Vogue shows Tyla using Caudalie face mist in the skin-care portion of her routine.

step_3.title: Moisturizer
step_3.product: Weleda Skin Food Original Ultra-Rich Cream
step_3.description: Use as the richer night moisturizer or spot-moisturizer on dry areas. Vogue says Tyla reaches for Weleda Skin Food in her skin-care routine.

step_4.title: Lip Mask
step_4.product: Laneige Lip Sleeping Mask
step_4.description: Finish by coating lips before bed or whenever they need a cushiony seal. Vogue says Tyla seals her lip color with Laneige Lip Sleeping Mask; as a skincare-only routine, it fits best as the PM lip-care step.
